_about: Fill this ONCE from the AWS console (view access is enough). The agent reuses it for every deployment in this account. See the skill's references/account-defaults.md. No secrets here. db_subnet_group_name, kms_key_id and monitoring_role_arn are CREATE-OR-REUSE: leave the field empty ("") to have the skill create it on the first deploy (via 1-networking / 3-kms / 2-iam) and wire it into the instance, or set an existing name/ARN to reuse it - create once, then record + reuse. master_user_secret_kms_key_id empty mirrors kms_key_id. vpc_id and vpc_security_group_ids are ALWAYS yours. IBM IDs are referenced by SSM Parameter Store NAME (ibm_*_ssm) so the values stay out of this repo - create those SecureString params and grant the deploy role ssm:GetParameter + kms:Decrypt. To embed the IDs literally instead, replace the ibm_*_ssm fields with ibm_customer_id / ibm_site_id.
